title: Melted German Bread Roast
description: A warm, flaky roast of rye bread topped with herbed butter and a lightly baked egg glaze, perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Egg yolk
ingredients.amount: 1 large, tempered with 1 tablespoon warm water

instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, combine the melted butter, minced garlic, chopped thyme, salt, and baking soda; stir until the baking soda dissolves.
Brush each sliced bread piece on both sides with the garlic butter mixture, ensuring even coverage.
Arrange the bread slices in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake the bread slices for 10 minutes, or until they are golden and slightly crispy.
While the bread is baking, whisk the egg yolk with 1 tablespoon of warm water until smooth; this is your tempered egg wash.
After the initial bake, remove the sheet from the oven, brush the tops of the bread slices with the tempered egg wash, and return to the oven.
Continue baking for an additional 8 minutes, or until the bread is melted, bubbly, and the edges are crisp.
